历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category (including Science) was approximately 9649 → 11780 → 24594 → 15473 → 18857. In 2023, there was a significant fluctuation due to the change in examination mode. After recovering to 15473 in 2024, it shifted back to 18857 in 2025. In the past two years, the overall trend has been a backward shift, with the 2025 baseline around 18857. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Guangxi was 58 in 2021, 31 in 2022, 33 in 2023, 37 in 2024, and 41 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 55, an increase of about 34% compared to 2025, which is a relatively large expansion, easing competition pressure but still causing the ranking to shift backward.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class university; on the Soft Science main ranking, it ranked 71st in 2021 → 71st in 2022 → 67th in 2023 → 62nd in 2024 → 65th in 2025 → 63rd in 2026, remaining stable in the 60–70 range in recent years, with a stable school level. In 2024, the reputation evaluation was somewhat negative, involving a teacher ethics incident (associate professor reported for sexual harassment), which had a certain negative impact on application psychology. On Douyin, it ranked 15th in overall popularity (high heat), and once ranked 1st in 2021, with overall high exposure and sustained attention. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, it achieved A- in Chinese Language and Literature, A- in Psychology, and A- in Education, with three A- disciplines, showing outstanding strength among normal universities, which is attractive for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The popularity of normal/education majors: recommended in 2022 (70.76) → divided and wait-and-see in 2023 (63.81) → divided and wait-and-see in 2024 (55.84), showing a continuous cooling trend. Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering are highly recommended, causing a significant diversion effect on Physics Category candidates. The number of Physics Category candidates in Guangxi was 208,117 in 2021 → 260,429 in 2025 → estimated about 268,912 in 2026 (+3.3%), with continuous growth in candidate scale and intensified competition. Shaanxi Normal University is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi, in the northwest region, which is an inter-provincial study for Guangxi candidates, with neutral regional preference. The university's enrollment proportion in Guangxi is about 2.2%–3.7%, not a major source of students.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 18857, the significant 34% enrollment expansion in 2026 causing a backward shift, the continuous growth of Guangxi Physics Category candidates (+3.3%), a slight rise in Soft Science ranking, negative reputation, and cooling of normal major popularity, the estimated minimum ranking for 2026 is about 22771, with a range of 22271–23271.

If your ranking is within the range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors, with Tier 1 as a reach and Tier 3 as safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 22000), you can focus on reaching for advantageous majors like Mathematics and Psychology. If your ranking is near the upper limit of the range (e.g., beyond 23000), it is recommended to use Tier 3 majors like Computer Science and Food Science and Engineering as safety.

The 2026 plan is 32, an increase of about 78% compared to 2025, which is a significant expansion, greatly easing competition pressure and causing the ranking to noticeably shift backward.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: It is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science ranking, it is 63rd, with a stable upward trend in recent years. The school level still has strong appeal to candidates. In 2024, the reputation evaluation was somewhat negative (teacher ethics incident), but in the 2026 reputation document, the school was not included, with no new negative signals. Douyin popularity ranks 15th overall (high heat), with high short video exposure and considerable application attention. Chinese Language and Literature is rated A-, Education is A-, which highly matches the History Category enrollment majors (Chinese Language and Literature, History, Education, etc.). The advantageous disciplines have strong appeal for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The popularity of teacher/education majors continues to cool (recommendation 70.76 in 2022 → differentiation and wait-and-see 55.84 in 2024), but the public-funded normal student policy of ministry-affiliated normal universities still has appeal. Chinese Language/Chinese major recommendation (67.35), Law is in a differentiation and wait-and-see state, Journalism and Communication is clearly discouraged. The number of Guangxi History Category candidates was 132,326 in 2021 → 119,153 in 2025 → estimated about 123,088 in 2026 (+3.3%), with a slight rebound in candidate scale. Shaanxi Normal University is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi, in the northwest region, requiring cross-province study for Guangxi candidates. The school's enrollment proportion in Guangxi History Category is about 1.8%–2.4%, not a major source of students, with neutral regional preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 2387, the significant 78% enrollment expansion in 2026 causing the ranking to noticeably shift backward, the slight increase in Guangxi History Category candidates (+3.3%), the rise in Soft Science ranking, high Douyin heat but somewhat negative reputation, and the cooling popularity of teacher majors, the estimated 2026 minimum ranking is about 3581, with a range of 3081–4081.
